---
title: "PLUMAS: Precipitation and Land Use Effects on Multiple Avian Species"
image: "../images/card_pics/fragments.jpg"
description: "PLUMAS examines how rainfall and land-use change jointly affect bird communities across Panama. By linking precipitation patterns to biodiversity, behavior, and physiology, this project clarifies how climate and habitat shape tropical ecosystems."
categories: ["Panama PLUMAS Project"]
contributors: "PLUMAS Team"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
